footer.tagline: Discover the best cafes in Bandung for remote work and hanging out with friends. Find your perfect spot today!

home.heroTitle: Find Your Perfect Bandung Coffee Spot

seo.homeTitle: BDGCafe - Honest Bandung Coffee Shop Reviews & Discovery
seo.homeDesc: Discover the best coffee shops in Bandung. Honest reviews on wifi, vibe, price, noise & more to find your perfect café or work spot.
seo.cafeDesc: {{name}} in {{location}}: our honest review of the wifi, vibe, noise, price & menu. See the full breakdown and nearby cafés on BDGCafe.
seo.aboutTitle: About BDGCafe - Bandung Coffee Shop Reviews
seo.aboutDesc: BDGCafe is a personal guide to Bandung's coffee shops - honest reviews and discovery for finding your perfect café.
seo.mitmTitle: Meet in the Middle - Find a Café Between Multiple Spots | BDGCafe
seo.mitmDesc: Pick multiple locations in Bandung and find great coffee shops in between - perfect for meeting friends halfway. A BDGCafe tool.
seo.privacyDesc: How BDGCafé collects and uses data: analytics, performance, error diagnostics, and the choices you have. We don't sell your data or show ads.

cafe.noReview: No review about this cafe yet.
cafe.openInGmaps: Open {{name}} in Google Maps (opens in new tab)
cafe.disclaimer: Rating is subjective and not accurate. All scores reflect a single visit and personal preference. Your experience may vary.

mitm.title: Meet in the Middle
mitm.subtitle: Drop markers for each person, find the middle, discover cafes nearby.

mitm.tryAdjust: Try increasing the search radius or adjusting the midpoint.
